pageSubtitle: Three specializations. One clear path. Find yours.

power.name: Power
power.description: Design, analyze, and manage electrical power systems — from generation to distribution. High demand across utilities, construction, and renewable energy sectors.

embedded.name: Embedded
embedded.description: Build the intelligent systems inside every modern device — from microcontrollers to real-time operating systems. Critical for automotive, IoT, and industrial automation.

communications.name: Communications
communications.description: Design communication systems, wireless networks, and signal processing pipelines. Essential in telecom, aerospace, and 5G infrastructure.

startTestCta: Not sure which fits you? Take the free test
